channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. 144 Years in the Making, Sagrada Familia Hits Its Peak  Newser
  2. ‘A joyful day’: final piece of Sagrada Familia’s central tower put in place  The Guardian
  3. Central tower of Barcelona's Sagrada Família completed  Vatican News
  4. The Sagrada Família reaches maximum height after more than a century  Euronews.com
  5. A crane lifts a final piece of a cross atop the Sagrada Familia's Tower of Jesus Christ in Barcelona  themercury.com

item.title: 12th-century Crusader sword found off northern Israel beach in rare seabed discovery - Ynetnews

item.title: Top NATO allies believe cyberattacks on hospitals are an act of war. They’re still struggling to fight back. - Politico

item.title: US security group looks to recruit hundreds of personnel as it targets Gaza role - Financial Times
item.description:
1. US security group looks to recruit hundreds of personnel as it targets Gaza role  Financial Times

item.title: Experts warn of rapid loss of water in the Baltic Sea: 'A vibrant reef is turning into an underwater wasteland' - Euronews.com
item.description:
1. Experts warn of rapid loss of water in the Baltic Sea: 'A vibrant reef is turning into an underwater wasteland'  Euronews.com

  3. Baltic Sea at lowest level since records began  Notes From Poland
  4. Baltic Sea rapidly shallowing — scientists note a rare climatic anomaly  Наша Ніва
  5. "Incredible": He walks on the frozen Baltic Sea; his video fascinates internet users  The Body Optimist

item.title: Co-founder of popular clothing brand dies after 17-story fall - Yahoo
item.description:
1. Co-founder of popular clothing brand dies after 17-story fall  Yahoo

  3. Millionaire Asos founder, 58, plunges to his death from 17th floor in mysterious balcony fall in Thailand  The Sun
  4. Quentin Griffiths, entrepreneur who co-founded the fashion giant Asos – obituary  The Telegraph
  5. Asos co-founder dies after Thailand balcony fall  BBC
